title: Aggregate: vgi_sum(i::BIGINT) FROM range(N)
description: Globally-registered aggregate exercising UPDATE + COMBINE + FINALIZE. ATTACH is still required to bootstrap the backing worker.
setup_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP TABLE bench_input AS SELECT i::BIGINT AS n FROM range(${param:rows}) t(i);

payload.schema_out: BIGINT result — 1 row per group; per-input-row output is ~0

notes: Aggregate parallelism uses UPDATE on each worker + COMBINE to merge states. Qualified call required: example.vgi_sum.
